org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Class ViewBinding

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.ViewBinding

  • public class ViewBinding
extends Object
    This class manage the views associated to a model element. This manager allows only one view per view container.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ViewBinding(ModelObject object) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void bind(UUID viewUUID, View view)
      Bind a view.
      ModelObject getModelObject()
      Replies the binded model object.
      <T> T getView(UUID viewUUID, Class<T> type)
      Replies the first binded view of the specified type.
      Map<UUID,View> getViews()
      Replies the views in the bindings.
      View replaceView(UUID from, UUID to)
      Move all the view components from a view to an other one.
      void unbind(UUID viewUUID)
      Unbind a view.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • ViewBinding

        ViewBinding(ModelObject object)
        Parameters:
        object -

    • Method Detail

      • getModelObject

        public ModelObject getModelObject()
        Replies the binded model object.
        Returns:
        the model object.

      • getView

        public <T> T getView(UUID viewUUID,
            Class<T> type)
        Replies the first binded view of the specified type.
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the view to search for.
        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the identifier of the view container that must enclose the view.
        type - is the type of the view to search for.
        Returns:
        the view or null if none.

      • bind

        public void bind(UUID viewUUID,
        View view)
        Bind a view.
        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the identifier of the view container that must enclose the view.
        view - is the view to bind to the model.

      • unbind

        public void unbind(UUID viewUUID)
        Unbind a view.
        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the identifier of the view container that must enclose the view.

      • getViews

        public Map<UUID,View> getViews()
        Replies the views in the bindings.
        Returns:
        the views in the bindings.

      • replaceView

        public View replaceView(UUID from,
               UUID to)
        Move all the view components from a view to an other one.
        Parameters:
        from - is the identifier of the view from which the components should move from.
        to - is the identifier of the view from which the components should move to.
        Returns:
        the replaced view.
